title: NIGHT LIVE STREAM HOST 7PM - 11PM
description:
Alluora is a leading beauty products company specialising in skincare, body care, and hair care. We are dedicated to delivering high-quality products to our customers and enhancing their beauty routines. Our products are sold online through platforms like TikTok and Shopee.

ROLE OVERVIEW:

We are looking for an enthusiastic and engaging Full Time/Part Time/ Freelance Live Streamer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for hosting live sessions to promote our products, engage with audiences, and drive sales on TikTok and Shopee. You are also required to develop engaging content across our social media platform to enhance our brand’s online presence and engagement.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

  • Attend Company Events when needed.
  • Prepare pre-marketing video before live streaming
  • Pre-preparation of live streams
  • Host regular livestream sessions on TikTok and Shopee to showcase Alluora's products, educating and engaging with potential customers.
  • Develop creative and engaging content to drive brand awareness and sales.
  • Interact with viewers in real-time, responding to comments, questions, and feedback to build a strong online community.
  • Analyse livestream metrics (viewership, engagement, sales conversion) to improve content performance and drive continuous growth.
  • Collaborate with the marketing team to create and execute content strategies, promotional events, and product launches.

REQUIREMENT:

  • Passionate about beauty products, skincare, body care, and hair care.
  • Prior experience in live streaming, social media influencing, or sales is a plus.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills.
  • Comfortable on camera and able to engage audiences effectively.
  • Flexibilities
  • Adaptabilities
  • Multitasking
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team

WHAT CAN WE PROVIDE:

  • Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.
  • Opportunity to work in a dynamic and growing company.
  • A supportive team environment with opportunities for growth and development.

HOW TO APPLY:

If you are passionate about beauty and love engaging with audiences, we'd love to hear from you!

Please send your resume and portfolio to Kelly.loh@alluora.com or Whatsapp Us @ +65 8509 5375

Join us at Alluora Pte Ltd and be a part of our journey to enhance beauty experiences worldwide!
